     // for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a
     // BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.
     package com.android.tools.r8.config;

     import com.android.tools.r8.CompilationMode;
     import com.android.tools.r8.ProgramConsumer;

     /**
      * Configuration interface for compilation settings.
     … +42 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

❯ s/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.

      * This follows Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) by focusing
      * solely on optimization-related configuration.

● 6단계: ConsumerConfiguration 인터페이스 생성

● Write(src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ConsumerConfiguration.java)

  1 tasks (0 done, 1 in progress, 0 open)
  ◼ InternalOptions 분리 설계

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Create file
 src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/ConsumerConfiguration.java
╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 // Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file
 // for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a
 // BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.
 package com.android.tools.r8.config;

 import com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceProvider;
 import com.android.tools.r8.ClassFileConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.DataResourceConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.DesugarGraphConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.DexFilePerClassFileConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.DexIndexedConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.GlobalSyntheticsConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.ProgramConsumer;
 import com.android.tools.r8.SyntheticInfoConsumer;
 import java.util.function.Consumer;

 /**
  * Configuration interface for consumer settings.
  * This follows Interface Segregation Principle (ISP) by separating
  * output consumer configuration from other settings.
  *
  * <p>Benefits:
  * <ul>
  *   <li>Clear contract for output handling</li>
  *   <li>Easier to implement custom output strategies</li>
  *   <li>Better testability with mock consumers</li>
  * </ul>
  */
 public interface ConsumerConfiguration {

   // ========== Program Consumer ==========

   /** Returns the program consumer for output. */
   ProgramConsumer getProgramConsumer();

   /** Returns true if a program consumer is set. */
   boolean hasConsumer();

   /** Returns the DEX indexed consumer if applicable. */
   DexIndexedConsumer getDexIndexedConsumer();

   /** Returns the DEX file per class consumer if applicable. */
   DexFilePerClassFileConsumer getDexFilePerClassFileConsumer();

   /** Returns the class file consumer if applicable. */
   ClassFileConsumer getClassFileConsumer();

   // ========== Resource Consumers ==========

   /** Returns the data resource consumer. */
   DataResourceConsumer getDataResourceConsumer();

   /** Returns the Android resource provider. */
   AndroidResourceProvider getAndroidResourceProvider();

   /** Returns the Android resource consumer. */
   AndroidResourceConsumer getAndroidResourceConsumer();

   // ========== Special Consumers ==========

   /** Returns the global synthetics consumer. */
   GlobalSyntheticsConsumer getGlobalSyntheticsConsumer();

   /** Returns true if a global synthetics consumer is set. */
   boolean hasGlobalSyntheticsConsumer();

   /** Returns the synthetic info consumer. */
   SyntheticInfoConsumer getSyntheticInfoConsumer();

   /** Returns the desugar graph consumer. */
   DesugarGraphConsumer getDesugarGraphConsumer();

   // ========== Metadata Consumers ==========

   /** Returns the build metadata consumer for D8. */
   Consumer<?> getD8BuildMetadataConsumer();

   /** Returns the build metadata consumer for R8. */
   Consumer<?> getR8BuildMetadataConsumer();

   // ========== Lifecycle ==========

   /** Signals completion to all registered consumers. */
   void signalFinishedToConsumers();
 }

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 Do you want to create ConsumerConfiguration.java?
 ❯ 1. Yes
   2. Yes, allow all edits during this session (shift+tab)
   3. No

 Esc to cancel · Tab to amend
